DESCRIPTION.en: sits at the right of the lawn
DESCRIPTION.zh: 飞天花盆里的植物无法被变为绵羊

Chat.en: It must be easier to grant someone else with a spare helmet instead of battling on our own, right?
Chat.zh: 比起自己去战斗，把自己多余的盔甲授予他人肯定更轻松吧。

Introduction.en: Spit past most your defenses, then claws forward.
Introduction.zh: 从火焰中钻出，穿过你的大部分防线，然后伸出利爪向前抓去。

DESCRIPTION.en: immune to fire attacks
DESCRIPTION.zh: 无法受到火焰伤害

DESCRIPTION.en: Shrinking Violet
DESCRIPTION.zh: 无法受到火焰伤害

Chat.en: Imp Zombie knows he's too old to wear a dragon costume like a kid on Halloween. But he doesn't care. Let the others judge. His spirit animal is a dragon, and he feels closer to his true self when he's dressed like this.
Chat.zh: 小鬼僵尸知道自己长大了，不能像小屁孩一样在万圣节穿上龙的服装。但他不在乎。让别人去评判吧。他的精神动物是龙，穿成这样，他感觉更接近真实的自己。

Introduction.en: Summoned past most of your defenses, then shambles forward.
Introduction.zh: 登场时通常越过你的大部分防御，然后摇摇晃晃地向前走。

DESCRIPTION.en: Shrinking Violet
DESCRIPTION.zh: 无法受到火焰伤害

DESCRIPTION.en: Necromancy
DESCRIPTION.zh: 无法受到火焰伤害

Chat.en: Frankly, Imp Monk Zombie decided to don the robes because of the sweet haircut that went with them.
Chat.zh: 老实说，僧侣小鬼决定穿上长袍，是因为它的发型很可爱。

Introduction.en: Immense zombie who brings the hammer down.
Introduction.zh: 巨尸总能一锤定音。

DESCRIPTION.en: crushes plants with hammer
DESCRIPTION.zh: 用石锤摧毁植物

DESCRIPTION.en: launches Imp Monk when damaged
DESCRIPTION.zh: 受重伤时丢出僧侣小鬼

DESCRIPTION.en: Blover, Hurrikale, Umbrella Leaf, Shrinking Violet
DESCRIPTION.zh: 无法受到火焰伤害

DESCRIPTION.en: takes much less knockback from plants
DESCRIPTION.zh: 受重伤时丢出僧侣小鬼

Chat.en: When Dark Ages Gargantuar wants to find pantaloons that fit him, he has to shop at the "Enormous & Towering" store. He hates it though. It's embarrassing. He just wants to shop for clothes where all the other zombies shop.
Chat.zh: 当黑暗巨尸想找一条合身的裤子时，肯定会去 “巨大与高耸 ”商店购物。但他讨厌这样，太尴尬了。他只想在其他僵尸购物的地方买衣服。

Introduction.en: The desolator of all, from dark times.
Introduction.zh: 黑暗时代毁灭一切的暴君。

DESCRIPTION.en: summons hordes of medieval zombies
DESCRIPTION.zh: 发射的火球可以孵出火龙小鬼

DESCRIPTION.en: shoots fireballs that can have Imp Dragon Zombies
DESCRIPTION.zh: 发射的火球可以孵出火龙小鬼

DESCRIPTION.en: scorches two lanes, killing all plants and zombies
DESCRIPTION.zh: 发射的火球可以孵出火龙小鬼

DESCRIPTION.en: scorches can be stopped by powerful attacks
DESCRIPTION.zh: 发射的火球可以孵出火龙小鬼

DESCRIPTION.en: Magnet Shroom plantfood
DESCRIPTION.zh: 发射的火球可以孵出火龙小鬼

Chat.en: With a rumble of destruction, Dr. Zomboss forged his Dark Dragon in the heart of a volcano. Then he tempered the beast in the chilled waters of Doom Lake. Finally he fed its furnace with coal from the Mines of Morbidity. And the paint job - that was done by Carl.
Chat.zh: 伴随着毁灭的轰鸣声，僵尸博士在火山中心铸造了他的黑暗巨龙。然后，他在末日湖冰冷的湖水中锤炼这头巨兽。最后，他用“疾病矿井”里的煤炭喂饱了它的熔炉。而喷漆工作则是由卡尔完成的。

Introduction.en: The desolator of all, from dark times.
Introduction.zh: 黑暗时代毁灭一切的暴君。

DESCRIPTION.en: summons hordes of medievaler zombies
DESCRIPTION.zh: 发射的火球可以孵出火龙小鬼

DESCRIPTION.en: shoots fireballs that can have Imp Dragon Zombies
DESCRIPTION.zh: 发射的火球可以孵出火龙小鬼

DESCRIPTION.en: scorches two lanes, killing all plants and zombies
DESCRIPTION.zh: 发射的火球可以孵出火龙小鬼

DESCRIPTION.en: scorches can be stopped by powerful attacks
DESCRIPTION.zh: 发射的火球可以孵出火龙小鬼

DESCRIPTION.en: Magnet Shroom plantfood
DESCRIPTION.zh: 发射的火球可以孵出火龙小鬼

Chat.en: Carl, once again, did an extroadinary paint job and made the dinosaur look phenomenal. Too bad Zomboss wasn't watching and accidentally crushed him while roaming around and showing off his fabulous work of fine art. He doesn't want to risk destroying the timeline, so scratch Carl's revival off the bucket list, so he just got Tugboat to do the rest, which is why some zombies noticed the paint looked inconsistent.
Chat.zh: 伴随着毁灭的轰鸣声，僵尸博士在火山中心铸造了他的黑暗巨龙。然后，他在末日湖冰冷的湖水中锤炼这头巨兽。最后，他用“疾病矿井”里的煤炭喂饱了它的熔炉。而喷漆工作则是由卡尔完成的。

Introduction.en: Regular beach bum zombie.
Introduction.zh: 普通的在海滩游荡的僵尸。

DESCRIPTION.en: Low Tide
DESCRIPTION.zh: 用电线杆摧毁植物

Chat.en: Pompadour Zombie recently noticed that he was wearing only one flip-flop. He THINKS he lost the other one while doing the limbo at a bonfire party the other night. But to be honest, that entire night is a little hazy ... and that flip-flop could be anywhere.
Chat.zh: 飞机头僵尸最近发现自己只穿了一只人字拖。他以为是前几天晚上在篝火晚会上跳 “凌波舞 ”时弄丢了另一只。但说实话，整个晚上他都有点不明所以……那只人字拖可能在任何地方。

Introduction.en: His starfish cone gives him twice the toughness of a normal pompadour zombie.
Introduction.zh: 他黏上海星的路障使他变得比原先抗打两倍。

DESCRIPTION.en: Low Tide
DESCRIPTION.zh: 用电线杆摧毁植物

Chat.en: Go to the beach, they said. Put a cone on your head, they said. So, yeah, that's what Pompadour Conehead did. He's at his best when following simple instructions.
Chat.zh: 他们说，去海滩。他们说，把路障戴在头上。没错，路障飞机头就是这么做的，他最擅长的就是听从简单的指示。

Introduction.en: His scallop shelled bucket gives him great resistance to damage.
Introduction.zh: 他挂上扇贝的铁桶使他极其抗揍。

DESCRIPTION.en: bucket can be removed by Magnet Shroom
DESCRIPTION.zh: 用电线杆摧毁植物

DESCRIPTION.en: Low Tide
DESCRIPTION.zh: 用电线杆摧毁植物

Chat.en: Pompadour Buckethead tried to learn to play the ukelele. He figured it would be easier to learn than the guitar on account of how small it is. But his stiff fingers ... they just weren't made for it. Now he just bangs on his bucket. And he's not half-bad either.
Chat.zh: 铁桶飞机头曾试图学习弹奏尤克里里。他认为这比吉他容易学，因为它很小。但他那僵硬的手指……根本不适合。现在他只能敲敲他的水桶，但弹得也不错。

Introduction.en: Crab-head Pompadour's crab exoskeleton provides tremendous protection.
Introduction.zh: 螃蟹飞机头的螃蟹外骨骼提供了巨大的保护。

DESCRIPTION.en: Low Tide
DESCRIPTION.zh: 用电线杆摧毁植物

Chat.en: More proof that Deep Sea Gargantuar is not a sea creature.
Chat.zh: 深海巨尸不是海洋生物的另一大证据。

Introduction.en: Regular beach blanket zombie.
Introduction.zh: 普通的在海滩边晒太阳的僵尸

DESCRIPTION.en: Low Tide
DESCRIPTION.zh: 用电线杆摧毁植物

Chat.en: Is it weird that we haven't seen any female zombies before? Some say yes. Some say no. Either way, Bikini Zombie is used to breaking new ground. She's not afraid to go where no woman zombie has gone before. You could call her a pioneer. You could call her a hero.
Chat.zh: 我们以前没见过女僵尸，这奇怪吗？有人说是，也有人说不奇怪。无论如何，比基尼僵尸习惯于开辟新天地。她不怕去没有女僵尸去过的地方。你可以称她为先驱，也可以称她为英雄。

Introduction.en: Her starfish cone gives her twice the toughness of a normal bikini zombie.
Introduction.zh: 她黏上海星的路障使她变得比原先抗打两倍。

DESCRIPTION.en: Low Tide
DESCRIPTION.zh: 用电线杆摧毁植物

Chat.en: See that starfish on Bikini Conehead's cone? She put it there herself. She gets a lot of compliments on it too. And sure enough, now it seems like everyone is accessorizing with starfish. She's a trendsetter, that one.
Chat.zh: 看到路障比基尼的海星了吗？是她自己放上去的，也因此得到了很多赞美。果然，现在好像每个人都在用海星做装饰，她真是能引领潮流啊。

DESCRIPTION.en: Low Tide
DESCRIPTION.zh: 用电线杆摧毁植物

Introduction.en: Her scallop shelled bucket gives her great resistance to damage.
Introduction.zh: 她挂上扇贝的铁桶使他极其抗揍。

DESCRIPTION.en: bucket can be removed by Magnet Shroom
DESCRIPTION.zh: 用电线杆摧毁植物

Chat.en: Bikini Buckethead had big ambitions. She wanted to do more than lurch around on a beach all day. Her life's dream: to perform internationally with a synchronized swimming team. Sadly, the nose plug was her undoing. If she only had a nose ...
Chat.zh: 铁桶比基尼的野心很大，她想做的不仅仅是整天在沙滩上晃来晃去。她一生的梦想是：在国际花样游泳队中表演。不幸的是，鼻塞成了她的致命伤。如果她只有一个鼻子没有塞……

Introduction.en: Crab-head Bikini's crab exoskeleton provides tremendous protection.
Introduction.zh: 螃蟹比基尼的螃蟹外骨骼提供了巨大的保护。

DESCRIPTION.en: Low Tide
DESCRIPTION.zh: 用电线杆摧毁植物

Chat.en: Sometimes it's comfortable to feel the sense of security in others' safety-shell.
Chat.zh: 有时候体会寄居蟹那种寄人篱下的安全感也是很舒适的。总之，仿生学万岁！

Introduction.en: Marks the arrival of a huge wet "wave" of zombies.
Introduction.zh: 预示着一大“浪”僵尸的到来。

Chat.en: Talk about a disgruntled zombie. Beach Flag Zombie is fed up. None of the other zombies seem to appreciate just how difficult it is for him to swim while holding a flag. Not once have they thanked him for doing the hard work that needs to be done. So it shouldn't come as a surprise: He's been interviewing for jobs somewhere else.
Chat.zh: 说到令他不满的僵尸，沙滩旗帜僵尸受够了。其他僵尸似乎都不理解他举着旗子游泳有多么困难，他们没有一次感谢他做了需要做的艰苦工作。因此，他去别的地方面试工作也就不足为奇了。

Introduction.en: Beach Rally Zombie and his flag marks the arrival of a floody "wave" of zombies.
Introduction.zh: 沙滩大动员僵尸和他的旗帜代表着一大群僵尸如潮涌般袭来。

Chat.en: He could have accelerated if he used his flag as a paddle.
Chat.zh: 要是他把他的旗帜当作桨来用的话还能走得更快。

Introduction.en: Snorkel zombies can swim underwater.
Introduction.zh: 浮潜僵尸可以在水底游动前进。

DESCRIPTION.en: submerges underwater to avoid attacks, will emerge when attacking plants
DESCRIPTION.zh: 潜入水中躲避攻击

DESCRIPTION.en: lobbing plants
DESCRIPTION.zh: 潜入水中躲避攻击

Chat.en: Snorkel Zombie has a hard time getting the Bikini Zombies. He's tried offering them flowers, jewelry, and even chocolate-covered brains. But nothing seems to work. They just can't seem to see past the snorkel on his face.
Chat.zh: 浮潜僵尸饱受感情之苦，为了得到比基尼僵尸的芳心，他试过给他们鲜花、珠宝，甚至是裹着巧克力的大脑，但似乎都不奏效，她们似乎就是看不透他脸上的潜水镜。

Introduction.en: Surfs past plants on the water, then carries board on land.
Introduction.zh: 冲浪越过水上的植物，再举着冲浪板上岸。

DESCRIPTION.en: rushes in from the side of lawn while on water, passing any plants
DESCRIPTION.zh: 潜入水中躲避攻击

DESCRIPTION.en: will fall off of his board when exiting water, now using it was a weapon
DESCRIPTION.zh: 潜入水中躲避攻击

DESCRIPTION.en: will crush nearby plants with his board or when he dies
DESCRIPTION.zh: 可以用冲浪板摧毁一株植物

DESCRIPTION.en: board will protect him against lobbing attacks
DESCRIPTION.zh: 可以用冲浪板摧毁一株植物

DESCRIPTION.en: Umbrella Leaf
DESCRIPTION.zh: 可以用冲浪板摧毁一株植物

DESCRIPTION.en: being ashed, devouring attacks
DESCRIPTION.zh: 可以用冲浪板摧毁一株植物

DESCRIPTION.en: Low Tide
DESCRIPTION.zh: 用电线杆摧毁植物

Chat.en: Surfer Zombie took up surfing just last year. At first, he only did it because he thought it would make him look cool. But he was a natural. Now he can hang 10 with the best of them. Now he's headed to the pro circuit. Now he IS cool.
Chat.zh: 冲浪僵尸去年才开始学习冲浪。起初，他只是觉得冲浪会让他看起来很酷，但他很有天赋。现在，他可以和最好的冲浪手一起冲浪。好了不说了，他要参加职业巡回赛了，可酷了。

Introduction.en: Surfs past plants on the water at a higher speed, then carries board on land.
Introduction.zh: 以更快的速度冲浪越过水上的植物，再举着冲浪板上岸。

DESCRIPTION.en: rushes in from the side of lawn while on water, passing any plants
DESCRIPTION.zh: 潜入水中躲避攻击

DESCRIPTION.en: rushes faster than normal surfers
DESCRIPTION.zh: 潜入水中躲避攻击

DESCRIPTION.en: will fall off of his board when exiting water, now using it was a weapon
DESCRIPTION.zh: 潜入水中躲避攻击

DESCRIPTION.en: will crush nearby plants with his board or when he dies
DESCRIPTION.zh: 可以用冲浪板摧毁一株植物

DESCRIPTION.en: board will protect him against lobbing attacks
DESCRIPTION.zh: 可以用冲浪板摧毁一株植物

DESCRIPTION.en: Umbrella Leaf
DESCRIPTION.zh: 可以用冲浪板摧毁一株植物

DESCRIPTION.en: being ashed, devouring attacks, E.M. Peach
DESCRIPTION.zh: 可以用冲浪板摧毁一株植物

DESCRIPTION.en: Low Tide
DESCRIPTION.zh: 用电线杆摧毁植物

Chat.en: During serious battles, most of the Surfer Zombies head towards the plants without hesitation, while the rest are hiding behind the shark-shaped machine doing all the work for them. Which is definitely NOT because of fear!
Chat.zh: 在那场大战中，大部分的冲浪僵尸冲锋陷阵，而还有一小部分躲在那只机械鲨鱼身后对它做着研究，但绝对不是因为怕死！

Introduction.en: Throws octopi at your plants to bind them up.
Introduction.zh: 向你的植物投掷章鱼，使植物无法行动。

DESCRIPTION.en: launches octopi at your plants, making them harmless
DESCRIPTION.zh: 在章鱼被摧毁之前，被缠住的植物没有行动力

DESCRIPTION.en: octopi needs to be destroyed to be removed
DESCRIPTION.zh: 在章鱼被摧毁之前，被缠住的植物没有行动力

DESCRIPTION.en: Umbrella Leaf, Infi-nut plantfood
DESCRIPTION.zh: 在章鱼被摧毁之前，被缠住的植物没有行动力

DESCRIPTION.en: Low Tide
DESCRIPTION.zh: 用电线杆摧毁植物

Chat.en: It started innocently enough. One day, Octo Zombie decided to get a pet octopus. But he loved that octopus so much, he got another and another... and another. Next thing you know, he was volunteering at an octopus rescue shelter. And now, well, no one wants to tell him, but he's pretty much the undersea equivalent of a cat lady. You should see how many are living at his house. It's quite startling.
Chat.zh: 事情的起因很简单。有一天，章鱼僵尸决定养一只宠物章鱼。但他太喜欢那只章鱼了，于是又买了一只，一只，又一只。接下来，他就在章鱼救助站当起了志愿者。现在，虽然没人愿意告诉他，但他已经成了海底的猫夫人，你应该看看他家里住了多少只猫，太惊人了！

Introduction.en: Casts line to pull far plants to him.
Introduction.zh: 甩出鱼钩，把远处的植物拉到他身边。

DESCRIPTION.en: pulls plants to the right
DESCRIPTION.zh: 把植物向右拉走

DESCRIPTION.en: plants next to him are tossed off the lawn
DESCRIPTION.zh: 相邻的植物直接被甩出草坪

DESCRIPTION.en: fishes from the right side of the lawn
DESCRIPTION.zh: 相邻的植物直接被甩出草坪

DESCRIPTION.en: Infi-nut plantfood, Resistant Radish
DESCRIPTION.zh: 相邻的植物直接被甩出草坪

Chat.en: Everyone is tired of Fisherman Zombie's fishing stories. He's always bragging about the size of his catch. Time and time again, he claims to have caught "the big one". But the fact of the matter is, no one has seen him actually catch a fish. Not once. It's more than a little suspicious.
Chat.zh: 每个人都听腻了渔夫僵尸的钓鱼故事。他总是吹嘘自己钓到的鱼有多大，一次又一次地声称自己钓到了“大鱼”，但事实上，没人见过他真正钓到鱼。一次也没有，这就有点可疑了。

Introduction.en: Washes in past your defenses, then flounders forward.
Introduction.zh: 冲过你的防线，然后蹒跚前行。

DESCRIPTION.en: Shrinking Violet
DESCRIPTION.zh: 用电线杆摧毁植物

DESCRIPTION.en: Low Tide
DESCRIPTION.zh: 用电线杆摧毁植物

Chat.en: Imp Mermaid Zombie couldn't decide whether to wear the top made out of coconut shells or the top made out of seashells. She went with the slinky coconut-shell number because, really, the seashells are soooo last wave.
Chat.zh: 美人鱼小鬼无法决定是穿椰子壳做的上衣还是贝壳做的上衣。她选择了那件纤细的椰壳上衣，因为，贝壳真的太常见了。

DESCRIPTION.en: Low Tide
DESCRIPTION.zh: 用电线杆摧毁植物

Introduction.en: Titanic zombie who isn't shellfish with his might.
Introduction.zh: 这个巨尸并不是贝类动物，但威力依然很强大。

DESCRIPTION.en: crushes plants with driftwood
DESCRIPTION.zh: 用浮木摧毁植物

DESCRIPTION.en: launches Imp Mermaid when damaged
DESCRIPTION.zh: 受重伤时丢出美人鱼小鬼

DESCRIPTION.en: Blover, Hurrikale, Umbrella Leaf, Shrinking Violet
DESCRIPTION.zh: 无法受到火焰伤害

DESCRIPTION.en: is faster but weaker in water, and stronger but slower on land
DESCRIPTION.zh: 受重伤时丢出僧侣小鬼

DESCRIPTION.en: Low Tide
DESCRIPTION.zh: 用电线杆摧毁植物

Chat.en: This big guy loves the water. When he's deep down in it, he feels light as a feather. He feels like he's flying. Most importantly, during those precious moments, he feels as if the weight of Imp Mermaid Zombie has been lifted from his shoulders.
Chat.zh: 这个大家伙喜欢水，当他深入水中时，感觉轻如鸿毛。他感觉自己在飞翔。最重要的是，在那段美好时光中，他感觉自己肩上美人鱼小鬼带来的重担被卸下了。

Introduction.en: The ravenous engine of carnage from the murky depths.
Introduction.zh: 来自高压深处的绞肉机。

DESCRIPTION.en: summons hordes of beach enjoying zombies
DESCRIPTION.zh: 嘴里的涡轮机将植物吸走

DESCRIPTION.en: uses it's mouth turbine to pull plants to it
DESCRIPTION.zh: 嘴里的涡轮机将植物吸走

DESCRIPTION.en: summoned zombie sharks can consume plants
DESCRIPTION.zh: 召唤来的僵尸鲨鱼能把植物吞下

DESCRIPTION.en: Tangle Kelp can jam turbine
DESCRIPTION.zh: 召唤来的僵尸鲨鱼能把植物吞下

Chat.en: The Zombot Sharktronic Sub is a true labor of love. Dr. Zomboss obsessed over every detail of the aquatic mechanism of doom as he worked on it day in and day out from the wee hours of the morning until well after dark. He carefully handcrafted the shark's nearly impenetrable skin. He shaved each razor-sharp tooth to a point by hand. And he painstakingly installed the lethal plant-consuming fan inside the machines' horrific maw all by himself. Zomboss shed more than one tear of joy when his masterpiece was complete. Say what you will about the evil genius, but he is quite passionate about his projects.
Chat.zh: 巨鲨号深潜艇是充满爱的劳动成果。僵尸博士日复一日地工作，从凌晨一直工作到天黑，痴迷于这个水下杀手的每一个细节。他小心翼翼地手工制作鲨鱼几乎坚不可摧的皮肤，亲手将每一颗锋利的牙齿剃成尖角，还独自一人费尽心机地在机器可怕的大嘴里安装了致命的涡轮发动机。当他的杰作完成时，僵尸博士禁不住潸然泪下。不得不承认这是一位邪恶的天才，但他对自己的作品充满热情。

Introduction.en: The ravenous engine of carnage from the murky depths.
Introduction.zh: 来自高压深处的绞肉机。

DESCRIPTION.en: summons hordes of stronger beach enjoying zombies
DESCRIPTION.zh: 嘴里的涡轮机将植物吸走

DESCRIPTION.en: uses it's mouth turbine to pull plants to it
DESCRIPTION.zh: 嘴里的涡轮机将植物吸走

DESCRIPTION.en: summoned zombie sharks can consume plants
DESCRIPTION.zh: 召唤来的僵尸鲨鱼能把植物吞下

DESCRIPTION.en: Tangle Kelp can jam turbine
DESCRIPTION.zh: 召唤来的僵尸鲨鱼能把植物吞下

Chat.en: The fall of the original Zombot Sharktronic Sub was truely a devastating event, and it is rumored to this day that Zomboss is still deeply saddened by its destruction. The Zombot Sharktronic Sub 2.0, surprisingly, is actually hated by Zomboss, whom had little passion for it. Sure, he spent time modelling it and created all the intricate details of massive mechanism, but he really couldn't care less. The skin? Impenetratable, obviously, but he didn't show much pride for it. The razor teeth and plant-killing fan? Forgot it was vulnerable to kelp. Heck, he actually had a proper sleep schedule during its production, and the funny thing is, it actually didn't disappoint! Zomboss still doesn't seem to proud of it, though.
Chat.zh: 巨鲨号深潜艇是充满爱的劳动成果。僵尸博士日复一日地工作，从凌晨一直工作到天黑，痴迷于这个水下杀手的每一个细节。他小心翼翼地手工制作鲨鱼几乎坚不可摧的皮肤，亲手将每一颗锋利的牙齿剃成尖角，还独自一人费尽心机地在机器可怕的大嘴里安装了致命的涡轮发动机。当他的杰作完成时，僵尸博士禁不住潸然泪下。不得不承认这是一位邪恶的天才，但他对自己的作品充满热情。

Introduction.en: Regular cave-dwelling zombie.
Introduction.zh: 普通穴居僵尸。

DESCRIPTION.en: immune to freezing attacks
DESCRIPTION.zh: 受伤一定程度会释放一群僵尸鸡

DESCRIPTION.en: Snowstorm
DESCRIPTION.zh: 受重伤时丢出雪人小鬼

Chat.en: Cave Zombie was busy painting handprints on cave walls when he was told to start fighting plants. He's not sure why he's fighting plants, but he hopes he can get back to painting soon. He was feeling inspired. He had plans for some big pieces. Art school was finally paying off.
Chat.zh: 洞窟僵尸正忙着在洞壁上画手印，却突然被告知要开始与植物战斗。他不知道自己为什么要和植物战斗，但他希望自己能尽快回来绘画。他刚好觉得灵感来了，计划画几幅大作品。在艺术学校的付出也将终于要有回报了。

Introduction.en: His mammoth horn cone makes him twice as tough as normal cave-dwellers.
Introduction.zh: 他的猛犸象牙路障使他变得比原先抗打两倍。

DESCRIPTION.en: immune to freezing attacks
DESCRIPTION.zh: 受伤一定程度会释放一群僵尸鸡

DESCRIPTION.en: Snowstorm
DESCRIPTION.zh: 受重伤时丢出雪人小鬼

Chat.en: Cave Conehead Zombie was the first zombie to invent the cone. He lashed the horn of a mammoth to a slab of petrified wood ... and boom! A cone! The invention of the cone changed everything for the zombies. EVERYTHING.
Chat.zh: 洞窟路障僵尸是第一个发明锥体的僵尸。他把猛犸象的角绑在一块石化木板上……啪！一个圆锥出现了！圆锥的发明改变了僵尸的一切。一切啊！

Introduction.en: His stone "bucket" hat provides great protection from damage.
Introduction.zh: 他头上的夹杂着铁块的石头“铁桶”使他极其抗揍。

DESCRIPTION.en: "bucket" can be removed by Magnet Shroom
DESCRIPTION.zh: 用电线杆摧毁植物

DESCRIPTION.en: immune to freezing attacks
DESCRIPTION.zh: 受伤一定程度会释放一群僵尸鸡

DESCRIPTION.en: Snowstorm
DESCRIPTION.zh: 受重伤时丢出雪人小鬼

Chat.en: Cave Buckethead Zombie likes rocks. He likes rocks A LOT. He strapped a rock to his head and called it a bucket. None of the other Cave Zombies know a "bucket" is, but they like his style.
Chat.zh: 洞窟铁桶僵尸喜欢石头，非常喜欢。他把石头绑在头上，称之为“铁桶”。其他洞窟僵尸都不知道“铁桶”是什么，但他们喜欢他的作风。

Introduction.en: The ice block on his head provides amazing protection from damage.
Introduction.zh: 他头上的冰块能提供惊人的保护，使他免受伤害。

DESCRIPTION.en: nearby fire plants will quickly melt his armor
DESCRIPTION.zh: 用电线杆摧毁植物

DESCRIPTION.en: immune to freezing attacks
DESCRIPTION.zh: 受伤一定程度会释放一群僵尸鸡

DESCRIPTION.en: Snowstorm
DESCRIPTION.zh: 受重伤时丢出雪人小鬼

Chat.en: One day, a Cave Zombie fell head-first into a glacial stream. It had been a bad day already, so he lay there in the frigid water for a long time contemplating the insignificance of his life. When he finally stood up, he discovered that his head was encased in ice. At last, his life had meaning! He was unique! He was Blockhead Zombie! At least, that's his story and he's sticking to it.
Chat.zh: 一天，洞窟僵尸一头栽进了冰川的溪流中。这一天已经够倒霉的了，所以他躺在冰冷的河水里沉思了很久，思考着自己生命是否毫无意义。当他终于站起来时，他发现自己的头被冰包裹着。他的生命终于有了意义！他是独一无二的！他是冰砖头僵尸！至少，这是独一无二故事，他一辈子不会忘的。

Introduction.en: Mammoth-headed Zombie's mammoth skull provides tremendous protection.
Introduction.zh: 猛犸头僵尸的猛犸头骨提供了巨大的保护。

DESCRIPTION.en: immune to freezing attacks
DESCRIPTION.zh: 受伤一定程度会释放一群僵尸鸡

DESCRIPTION.en: Snowstorm
DESCRIPTION.zh: 受重伤时丢出雪人小鬼

Chat.en: He now has to stay at least 10 feet away from Dr. Zomboss to not trigger his allergies.
Chat.zh: 那不是真正的猛犸头骨，既然见识过僵尸博士的科技肯定能知道那是努力的结晶。

Introduction.en: Marks the arrival of a huge frosty "wave" of zombies.
Introduction.zh: 预示着一大波乘着冰风的僵尸的到来。

DESCRIPTION.en: immune to freezing attacks
DESCRIPTION.zh: 受伤一定程度会释放一群僵尸鸡

Chat.en: Cave Flag Zombie has been in the flag-carrying business for a long time. It's been his life's work. He's good at it. But sometimes, just sometimes, he longs for a change. He wonders if he could be good at something else. He wonders if he could leave it all behind and start fresh. He's pretty sure he's having a mid-life crisis.
Chat.zh: 洞窟旗帜僵尸从事摇旗工作已经有很长一段时间了，已经成为他的一番事业了，并且无比擅长这一行业。 但有时，只是有时，他渴望改变。他想知道自己是否能胜任其他工作，是否能抛开一切、重新开始，他很确定自己遇到了中年危机。

Introduction.en: Cave Rally Zombie and his flag marks the arrival of a large icy storm of zombies.
Introduction.zh: 洞窟大动员僵尸和他的旗帜代表着超大群僵尸乘着冰风雪暴而来。

DESCRIPTION.en: immune to freezing attacks
DESCRIPTION.zh: 受伤一定程度会释放一群僵尸鸡

Chat.en: If he hadn't been so fast, his flag would have been taken away by Dodo Rider Zombie.
Chat.zh: 要不是洞窟大动员僵尸的速度够快，不然旗子早就被死神僵尸叼走了。

Introduction.en: Zombie that can throw snow balls at range.
Introduction.zh: 可以在一定范围内投掷雪球。

DESCRIPTION.en: will throw snow balls at plants which will eventually freeze them into ice blocks
DESCRIPTION.zh: 雪球能冷冻植物，直到植物被冻成冰块

DESCRIPTION.en: immune to freezing attacks
DESCRIPTION.zh: 受伤一定程度会释放一群僵尸鸡

DESCRIPTION.en: Snowstorm
DESCRIPTION.zh: 受重伤时丢出雪人小鬼

Chat.en: Shhhhh ... Hunter Zombie didn't actually kill that sabertooth tiger. He found the skin at a thrift store. Also, he's a vegetarian. Tell no one.
Chat.zh: 嘘……猎人僵尸其实并没有杀死头上顶着的那只剑齿虎，这是在旧货店找到的虎皮。另外，他是个素食主义者，别告诉别人。

Introduction.en: Zombie that can throw snow balls towards his farthest target.
Introduction.zh: 可以朝本行最远的目标投掷雪球。

DESCRIPTION.en: will lob snowballs unlike normal hunter zombies that throw them straight
DESCRIPTION.zh: 雪球能冷冻植物，直到植物被冻成冰块

DESCRIPTION.en: will lob snow balls at plants which will eventually freeze them into ice blocks
DESCRIPTION.zh: 雪球能冷冻植物，直到植物被冻成冰块

DESCRIPTION.en: immune to freezing attacks
DESCRIPTION.zh: 受伤一定程度会释放一群僵尸鸡

Chat.en: He won everyone else because no one else is willing to be touched by his sparky helmet.
Chat.zh: 他能称霸是因为没人想碰到他那满是刺的头盔。

Introduction.en: Dodo bird with an imp rider.
Introduction.zh: 载着小鬼的渡渡鸟。

DESCRIPTION.en: dodo can fly over ground hazards as well as troublesome plants
DESCRIPTION.zh: 渡渡鸟可以扑腾飞起，越过障碍和麻烦的植物

DESCRIPTION.en: Blover, Hurrikale, Umbrella Leaf
DESCRIPTION.zh: 渡渡鸟可以扑腾飞起，越过障碍和麻烦的植物

DESCRIPTION.en: Shrinking Violet
DESCRIPTION.zh: 渡渡鸟可以扑腾飞起，越过障碍和麻烦的植物

DESCRIPTION.en: immune to freezing attacks
DESCRIPTION.zh: 受伤一定程度会释放一群僵尸鸡

Chat.en: Dodo Rider believes dodos are the future of transportation. He believes a public dodo-riding system is not only a wise expenditure of tax dollars but would help the vast majority of zombies get where they need to go more efficiently. Everyone keeps telling him there's no future in dodos, but he refuses to listen.
Chat.zh: 渡渡鸟骑手认为渡渡鸟是交通工具的进化方向。他认为，公共渡渡鸟骑行系统不仅是明智的节省税款手段，还能帮助绝大多数僵尸更高效地到达目的地。然而每个人都告诉他渡渡鸟没有未来，但他不信。

Introduction.en: Strong zombie that can push blocks of ice across the lawn.
Introduction.zh: 健壮到能推动冰块的僵尸。

DESCRIPTION.en: puches ice blocks with imps in them onto the lawn
DESCRIPTION.zh: 推动的冰块能碾压植物

DESCRIPTION.en: crushes plants with frozen blocks
DESCRIPTION.zh: 推动的冰块能碾压植物

DESCRIPTION.en: Hot Potato
DESCRIPTION.zh: 推动的冰块能碾压植物

DESCRIPTION.en: Shrinking Violet plantfood
DESCRIPTION.zh: 推动的冰块能碾压植物

DESCRIPTION.en: immune to freezing attacks
DESCRIPTION.zh: 受伤一定程度会释放一群僵尸鸡

Chat.en: Troglobite has been pushing ice blocks across the tundra day in and day out for as long as he can remember. It's cold and exhausting work, and frankly, he's ready for a vacation. He'd like to go somewhere sunny and warm for a change. He'd like to relax in the sand. He hears Big Wave Beach is nice this time of year.
Chat.zh: 从穴居僵尸记事起，他就日复一日地在冻原上推冰块。这项工作又冷又累，老实说，他已经准备好去度假了。他想去一个阳光明媚、温暖的地方，换换心情。他想在沙滩上放松一下，正好听说这个季节的巨浪沙滩很不错。

Introduction.en: Zombie that is strong enough to push blocks of ice that are more dangerous onto the lawn.
Introduction.zh: 健壮到能推入更危险的冰块的僵尸。

DESCRIPTION.en: puches ice blocks with hunter zombies in them onto the lawn
DESCRIPTION.zh: 推动的冰块能碾压植物

DESCRIPTION.en: crushes plants with frozen blocks
DESCRIPTION.zh: 推动的冰块能碾压植物

DESCRIPTION.en: Hot Potato
DESCRIPTION.zh: 推动的冰块能碾压植物

DESCRIPTION.en: immune to freezing attacks
DESCRIPTION.zh: 受伤一定程度会释放一群僵尸鸡

Chat.en: The reason why Hunter Leader Zombie was caught up with by Troglobite Warchief is that he proposed a challenge about who holds longer in the icy water.
Chat.zh: 猎人领袖僵尸之所以会被穴居首领僵尸超越，犯下的最大的错误就是跟他比谁更受得了冻。

Introduction.en: Zombie hiding in a log with a pack of snow weasels. Weasels are released when her log is shattered.
Introduction.zh: 和一群雪鼬鼠躲在一根木头里的僵尸。当她的木头被击碎时，黄鼠狼就会被释放出来。

DESCRIPTION.en: releases zombie ice weasels when damaged
DESCRIPTION.zh: 受伤一定程度会释放一群冰鼬

DESCRIPTION.en: will not release ice weasels when stunned
DESCRIPTION.zh: 受伤一定程度会释放一群僵尸鸡

DESCRIPTION.en: immune to freezing attacks
DESCRIPTION.zh: 受伤一定程度会释放一群僵尸鸡

DESCRIPTION.en: Snowstorm
DESCRIPTION.zh: 受重伤时丢出雪人小鬼

Chat.en: Weasel Hoarder claims she's the one who wrote the song "Pop! Goes the Weasel." And for eons now, she's been demanding royalties for it. But everyone just ignores her. They know what Weasel Hoarder can't even carry a tune, much less write a catchy ditty about the sound of vermin make when hugged a bit too tightly.
Chat.zh: 囤鼬僵尸声称“黄鼠狼快跑”这首歌是她写的。一直以来，她都在索要版税，但大家都不理她，他们知道 囤鼬僵尸连调都搭不上，更不用说写一首朗朗上口的小曲来描述害虫被抱得太紧时发出的声音了。

Introduction.en: Once released, weasels run full speed even over ice floes to nibble your brains.
Introduction.zh: 一旦挣脱束缚，冰鼬将会跳过所有浮冰全力冲向你的大脑。

DESCRIPTION.en: immune to freezing attacks
DESCRIPTION.zh: 受伤一定程度会释放一群僵尸鸡

Chat.en: Skweek-ka-REE!
Chat.zh: 吱——嘎——呼呼呼！

Introduction.en: Thrown over most of your defenses, then ambles onward.
Introduction.zh: 被丢出越过你的防线，然后再往前或往后走。

DESCRIPTION.en: Shrinking Violet
DESCRIPTION.zh: 用冰棍摧毁植物

DESCRIPTION.en: immune to freezing attacks
DESCRIPTION.zh: 受伤一定程度会释放一群僵尸鸡

DESCRIPTION.en: Snowstorm
DESCRIPTION.zh: 受重伤时丢出雪人小鬼

Chat.en: Yeti Imp recently took up knitting. He started with a scarf, moved to mittens and eventually knitted an entire bodysuit out of hair he shaved off of Yeti Zombie. He just loves knitting. When those needles are in his hands, he feels a sense of calm he's never felt before.
Chat.zh: 雪人小鬼最近开始编织了。他从围巾开始，到手套，最后用从雪人僵尸身上剃下来的头发编织了一整套连体服。他就是喜欢编织。当针在他手中时，他感到一种前所未有的平静。

Introduction.en: Massive sloth skinned zombie with a case of the imps. Carries and throws three imps instead of just one.
Introduction.zh: 披着树懒皮的巨尸。可携带和投掷三个小鬼，而不是一个。

DESCRIPTION.en: crushes plants with icicle
DESCRIPTION.zh: 用冰棍摧毁植物

DESCRIPTION.en: fires off Yeti Imps when damaged
DESCRIPTION.zh: 受重伤时丢出雪人小鬼

DESCRIPTION.en: Blover, Hurrikale, Umbrella Leaf, Shrinking Violet
DESCRIPTION.zh: 受重伤时丢出雪人小鬼

DESCRIPTION.en: will throw 3 total Yeti Imps, with each one randomly facing forwards or backwards
DESCRIPTION.zh: 受重伤时丢出雪人小鬼

DESCRIPTION.en: immune to freezing attacks
DESCRIPTION.zh: 受伤一定程度会释放一群僵尸鸡

DESCRIPTION.en: Snowstorm
DESCRIPTION.zh: 受重伤时丢出雪人小鬼

Chat.en: Somewhere along the line, Sloth Gargantuar contracted a bad case of Yeti Imps. He used soap, medicinal powders, and a salve made from sloth slobber in an attempt to get rid of them ... to no avail. But the truth is, he's grown used to their presence. The darn things are itchy. They're always squabbling. They nag him endlessly. But at this point, he'd probably miss them if they ever cleared up.
Chat.zh: 不知从什么时候起，树懒皮巨尸被烦人的雪人小鬼缠上了。他用肥皂、药粉和树懒口水制成的药膏试图赶走它们......却无济于事。但事实上，他已经习惯了它们的存在。这些该死的东西让他很痒。他们总是争吵不休，没完没了地唠叨。但在这一点上，如果他们消失了，他可能会想念他们。

Introduction.en: The mammoth mech with an ice blast from the past.
Introduction.zh: 来自冰河世纪的机械猛犸。

DESCRIPTION.en: summons hordes of frozen zombies
DESCRIPTION.zh: 受重伤时丢出雪人小鬼

DESCRIPTION.en: blows ice winds onto the lawn
DESCRIPTION.zh: 受重伤时丢出雪人小鬼

DESCRIPTION.en: creates iceblocks with frozen foes inside
DESCRIPTION.zh: 受重伤时丢出雪人小鬼

DESCRIPTION.en: throws an ice chunk at a random plant on the lawn
DESCRIPTION.zh: 受重伤时丢出雪人小鬼

DESCRIPTION.en: Hot Potato
DESCRIPTION.zh: 受重伤时丢出雪人小鬼

Chat.en: Dr. Zomboss was real impressed with himself when he came up with the idea to build a weaponized woolly mammoth with the power to blast snow and ice out of its mechanical trunk. But what Dr. Zomboss didn't realize until it was too late: He's allergic to mammoth fur, even to those bionically made. Now he has to load up on allergy medication every time he wants to take the darn thing out for a spin.
Chat.zh: 当僵尸博士想出制造一座武装的长毛猛犸象，并能从机械躯干中喷射出冰雪的时候，他几乎要对自己刮目相看。但是，僵尸博士直到坐进这个机器意识到：他对猛犸象的皮毛过敏，即使是仿生制造。现在，每次他想带着这该死的东西出去兜风时，都得大把大把地吃抗过敏药。

Introduction.en: The mammoth mech with an ice blast from the past.
Introduction.zh: 来自冰河世纪的机械猛犸。

DESCRIPTION.en: summons hordes of stronger frozen zombies
DESCRIPTION.zh: 受重伤时丢出雪人小鬼

DESCRIPTION.en: blows ice winds onto the lawn
DESCRIPTION.zh: 受重伤时丢出雪人小鬼

DESCRIPTION.en: creates iceblocks with stronger frozen foes inside
DESCRIPTION.zh: 受重伤时丢出雪人小鬼

DESCRIPTION.en: throws an ice chunk at a random plant on the lawn
DESCRIPTION.zh: 受重伤时丢出雪人小鬼

DESCRIPTION.en: will summon full board icewinds when recovering
DESCRIPTION.zh: 受重伤时丢出雪人小鬼

DESCRIPTION.en: Hot Potato
DESCRIPTION.zh: 受重伤时丢出雪人小鬼

Chat.en: Dr. Zomboss has been searching for AGES now to find the perfect medication that will cure his allergies of furry mammoths, to no avail, obviously. The amount needed to create the medication could create generations of mechs. Zomboss didn't want his state-of-the-art technological wonder put to the waste, so he decided to give it a shot. The zombies ended up creating meds for weasel fur instead of mammoth fur.
Chat.zh: 当僵尸博士想出制造一座武装的长毛猛犸象，并能从机械躯干中喷射出冰雪的时候，他几乎要对自己刮目相看。但是，僵尸博士直到坐进这个机器意识到：他对猛犸象的皮毛过敏，即使是仿生制造。现在，每次他想带着这该死的东西出去兜风时，都得大把大把地吃抗过敏药。

Introduction.en: Regular expertly-coiffed moustache zombie.
Introduction.zh: 普普通通但是会定期修理胡须的僵尸。

DESCRIPTION.en: Parachute Rain
DESCRIPTION.zh: 受重伤时丢出雪人小鬼

Chat.en: Adventurer Zombie just went looking for jolly good show and somehow ended up in the Lost City. "Hmm. Yes. Quite." is all that he would say on the matter.
Chat.zh: 冒险家僵尸只是去寻找欢乐的好戏，结果却莫名其妙地来到了失落之城。“嗯，没错。”他对这件事只想这么评价。

Introduction.en: His expedition cone makes him twice tougher than normal adventurers.
Introduction.zh: 他的远征型路障使他变得比原先抗打两倍。

DESCRIPTION.en: Parachute Rain
DESCRIPTION.zh: 受重伤时丢出雪人小鬼

Chat.en: No one ever presumes that he's Dr. Unlivingstone. Just once, though he wish that someone would.
Chat.zh: 从来没有人看出他就是活死石博士。哪怕一次，他都希望有人能看出来。

Introduction.en: His rugged bucket provides considerable protection from damage.
Introduction.zh: 他坚固的铁桶使他极其抗揍。

DESCRIPTION.en: bucket can be removed by Magnet Shroom
DESCRIPTION.zh: 用电线杆摧毁植物

DESCRIPTION.en: Parachute Rain
DESCRIPTION.zh: 受重伤时丢出雪人小鬼

Chat.en: Buckethead Adventurer's greatest discovery was that one morning, without warning or reason, there was a bucket on his head.
Chat.zh: 铁桶探宝僵尸最大的发现是，有一天早上，在毫无征兆或原因的情况下，他的头上多了一个铁桶。

Introduction.en: His resin-covered tent provides incredible protection.
Introduction.zh: 他那粘满树脂的帐篷为他提供无以伦比的保护。

DESCRIPTION.en: Parachute Rain
DESCRIPTION.zh: 受重伤时丢出雪人小鬼

Chat.en: Tent-headed Adventurer loves to lie in sleeping bag and is reluctant to leave his tent... Now he's got the solution!
Chat.zh: 帐篷头探险家特别喜欢赖床，迟迟不肯离开自己的帐篷……现在他彻底解决了这个问题！

Introduction.en: Marks the arrival of an intrepid "wave" of zombies.
Introduction.zh: 预示着一大波敢死的僵尸的到来。

Chat.en: Flag Adventurer Zombie is always shouting "Tally ho!" as he leads the charge. At least, he's shouting it in his head.
Chat.zh: 旗帜探宝僵尸在带头冲锋时总是大喊 “塔里吼！”。至少，他是在心里喊的。

Introduction.en: Rally Adventurer marks the arrival of large group of adventurers.
Introduction.zh: 大动员探宝家的出现代表了一大群探宝者的到来。

Chat.en: He can't help himself from rushing towards that precious treasure.
Chat.zh: 他已经迫不及待夺取整个僵尸文明最崇尚的瑰宝——大脑。

Introduction.en: Drops in past defenses.
Introduction.zh: 掉入你的防御中心。

DESCRIPTION.en: drops in and hangs for a moment before landing on your lawn
DESCRIPTION.zh: 坠入并在草坪中央悬挂一段时间

DESCRIPTION.en: Umbrella Leaf
DESCRIPTION.zh: 坠入并在草坪中央悬挂一段时间

DESCRIPTION.en: Parachute Rain

Chat.en: He faked his pilot's license and figured nobody would notice. But they did.
Chat.zh: 他伪造了自己的飞行证，还以为大家没注意到，实际上所有人都很清楚。

Introduction.en: Drops in and brings adventurers in to your defences.
Introduction.zh: 掉入你的防御中心，并带来探宝僵尸。

DESCRIPTION.en: brings along other adventuring zombies with him
DESCRIPTION.zh: 坠入并在草坪中央悬挂一段时间

DESCRIPTION.en: drops in and hangs for a moment before landing on your lawn
DESCRIPTION.zh: 坠入并在草坪中央悬挂一段时间

Chat.en: Even without knowing how to fly a plane, ensuring passengers' safety truly takes skill.
Chat.zh: 即使不会开飞机也能保证乘客的安全，也算是真本事了。

Introduction.en: Digs up plants and throws them behind him.
Introduction.zh: 将植物铲起并丢到身后。

DESCRIPTION.en: digs up nearby plants, launching them back a few tiles
DESCRIPTION.zh: 抵挡直射来的子弹，但是在投掷子弹面前很脆弱

DESCRIPTION.en: blocks stright projectiles
DESCRIPTION.zh: 抵挡直射来的子弹，但是在投掷子弹面前很脆弱

DESCRIPTION.en: cannot block lobbed projectiles, Resistant Radish
DESCRIPTION.zh: 抵挡直射来的子弹，但是在投掷子弹面前很脆弱

DESCRIPTION.en: Parachute Rain
DESCRIPTION.zh: 受重伤时丢出雪人小鬼

Chat.en: Excavator Zombie once heard a song about having a hammer. He liked the idea, but decided it was too mainstream for him - so he got a shovel. Now he's confident that he's clearly the coolest zombie, the others are just too jealous to admit it.
Chat.zh: 发掘者僵尸曾听过一首关于拥有了锤子的歌。他很喜欢这个想法，但觉得这对他来说太主流了——于是他就有了一把铲子。现在他自信满满，认为自己显然是最酷的僵尸，只是其他僵尸嫉妒得不敢承认罢了。

Introduction.en: Her parasol provides protection from lobbed projectiles.
Introduction.zh: 她的洋伞使她免受投掷子弹的伤害。

DESCRIPTION.en: blocks lobbed projectiles
DESCRIPTION.zh: 抵挡直射来的子弹，但是在投掷子弹面前很脆弱

DESCRIPTION.en: cannot block stright projectiles
DESCRIPTION.zh: 抵挡直射来的子弹，但是在投掷子弹面前很脆弱

DESCRIPTION.en: Parachute Rain
DESCRIPTION.zh: 受重伤时丢出雪人小鬼

Chat.en: Wealthy beyond reason, the Parasol Zombie lived a life of luxury - when what she craved was a life of adventure. She funded the expedition to the Lost City and set out to see its wonders for herself, never forgetting to bring her trusty parasol. "In case it rains," she explained - but it only came out sounding like "Brains".
Chat.zh: 阳伞僵尸富可敌国，过着奢华的生活，而她渴望的是冒险生活。她资助了前往失落之城的探险队，并亲自踏上了一览奇观的旅程，还不忘带上她那把值得信赖的阳伞。她解释说，“以防落水”，但听起来却像“以防落脑”。

Introduction.en: Bug carries zombie in over ground defenses and lifts him over barriers.
Introduction.zh: 蜻蜓使僵尸越过低矮植物，并把他举过其他障碍物。

DESCRIPTION.en: carries a basic onto the lawn
DESCRIPTION.zh: 在水中移速提升

DESCRIPTION.en: flies over ground plants, struggles hard to fly over most plants
DESCRIPTION.zh: 在水中移速提升

DESCRIPTION.en: Bonk Choy, Blover, Hurrikale, Umbrella Leaf, Tall-nut
DESCRIPTION.zh: 在水中移速提升

DESCRIPTION.en: Parachute Rain
DESCRIPTION.zh: 受重伤时丢出雪人小鬼

Chat.en: Bug Zombie and Bug make a great team. Partly because Bug gives Bug Zombie great mobility, but mostly because they share an intense disinterest in horses.
Chat.zh: 僵尸和蜻蜓是绝佳的搭档。部分原因是蜻蜓给了僵尸强大的机动性，但主要原因是他们都对马不感兴趣。

Introduction.en: Bug carries a conehead zombie in over ground defenses and lifts him over barriers.
Introduction.zh: 蜻蜓使僵尸越过低矮植物，并把他举过其他障碍物。

Chat.en: They've spent their whole lives dedicated to finding where the production of roadcones is in the Lost City, they've been following the only lead they've had in years.
Chat.zh: 僵尸和蜻蜓是绝佳的搭档。部分原因是蜻蜓给了僵尸强大的机动性，但主要原因是他们都对马不感兴趣。

Introduction.en: Bug carries a buckethead zombie in over ground defenses and lifts him over barriers.
Introduction.zh: 蜻蜓使僵尸越过低矮植物，并把他举过其他障碍物。

DESCRIPTION.zh: 在水中移速提升

DESCRIPTION.zh: 用电线杆摧毁植物

DESCRIPTION.en: Bonk Choy, Blover, Hurrikale, Umbrella Leaf, Tall-nut
DESCRIPTION.zh: 在水中移速提升

DESCRIPTION.en: Parachute Rain
DESCRIPTION.zh: 受重伤时丢出雪人小鬼

Chat.en: They actually don't know each other, bug just sees a shiny object and flies towards it.
Chat.zh: 僵尸和蜻蜓是绝佳的搭档。部分原因是蜻蜓给了僵尸强大的机动性，但主要原因是他们都对马不感兴趣。

Introduction.en: Bug carries a tent-headed zombie in over ground defenses and lifts him over barriers.
Introduction.zh: 蜻蜓使僵尸越过低矮植物，并把他举过其他障碍物。

DESCRIPTION.zh: 在水中移速提升

DESCRIPTION.zh: 在水中移速提升

DESCRIPTION.zh: 在水中移速提升

Chat.en: When asked about how bug can lift up an entire tent and zombie, he says nothing. Why you may ask? Well it's quite simple, bugs can't talk.
Chat.zh: 僵尸和蜻蜓是绝佳的搭档。部分原因是蜻蜓给了僵尸强大的机动性，但主要原因是他们都对马不感兴趣。

Introduction.en: Swings in on a vine to lane midway onto your lawn.
Introduction.zh: 抓着藤蔓进入草坪的中央。

DESCRIPTION.en: lands four to six tiles into your lawn
DESCRIPTION.zh: 直接越过四到六格进入你的草坪

DESCRIPTION.en: Blover, Hurrikale, Umbrella Leaf
DESCRIPTION.zh: 直接越过四格进入你的草坪

Chat.en: Relic Hunter has hunted some pretty impressive relic in his days. Idols, antiques, curios... he's hunted 'em all.
Chat.zh: 遗迹猎宝僵尸曾猎取过一些令人印象深刻的文物。偶像、古董、古玩……他都猎过。

Introduction.en: Drops pack on Gold Tile.
Introduction.zh: 将背包丢在黄金地砖上。

DESCRIPTION.en: when reaching a gold tile, he will set up a tent that spawns adventurer zombies
DESCRIPTION.zh: 背包会在原地搭起帐篷，源源不断地钻出僵尸

DESCRIPTION.en: if he dies before reaching a gold tile, his backpack will become a blocking obstacle
DESCRIPTION.zh: 背包会在原地搭起帐篷，源源不断地钻出僵尸

DESCRIPTION.en: Shrinking Violet, being ashed, devouring attacks
DESCRIPTION.zh: 背包会在原地搭起帐篷，源源不断地钻出僵尸

DESCRIPTION.en: Parachute Rain
DESCRIPTION.zh: 受重伤时丢出雪人小鬼

Chat.en: Imp Porter is stronger than he looks. He's also more charming, smarter and has a better education.
Chat.zh: 搬运工小鬼不仅比看上去更强壮，还更有魅力、更聪明、受过更好的教育。

Introduction.en: Uses skull to steal sun, then unleashes energy in a destructive beam.
Introduction.zh: 用骷髅头偷走阳光蓄能，再发射一道致命的激光。

DESCRIPTION.en: steals sun with his crystal skull
DESCRIPTION.zh: 会尝试偷走阳光

DESCRIPTION.en: stolen sun cannot be retrieved
DESCRIPTION.zh: 偷走的阳光不会再返还

DESCRIPTION.en: after powering his skull, it shoots a powerful laser beam
DESCRIPTION.zh: 偷走的阳光不会再返还

DESCRIPTION.en: Parachute Rain
DESCRIPTION.zh: 受重伤时丢出雪人小鬼

Chat.en: Unlike the more famous crystal skulls, turquoise skulls are totally non-mysterious and common as dirt.
Chat.zh: 与更有名的水晶头骨不同，青骷髅头完全不神秘，而且像泥土一样常见。

Introduction.en: Gets tossed past most defenses, then explores on foot.
Introduction.zh: 被丢过你的大部分防线，再向前探索。

DESCRIPTION.en: Shrinking Violet
DESCRIPTION.zh: 偷走的阳光不会再返还

DESCRIPTION.en: Parachute Rain
DESCRIPTION.zh: 受重伤时丢出雪人小鬼

Chat.en: Nepotism got Lost City Imp where he is. He's Bug Zombie's second cousin thrice removed, but he parlayed that connection into a sweet gig getting carried around in a little box.
Chat.zh: 靠裙带关系，失落之城小鬼才有今天的地位。他是蜻蜓僵尸三代单传的二表哥，但他却靠着这层关系获得了一份好工作，被装在一个小轿子里到处跑。

Introduction.en: Terrifying behemoth of exploratory fury.
Introduction.zh: 可怕但乐忠探索的巨尸。

DESCRIPTION.en: crushes plants with torch
DESCRIPTION.zh: 用火把摧毁植物

DESCRIPTION.en: throws Lost City Imp when damaged
DESCRIPTION.zh: 受重伤时丢出失落之城小鬼

DESCRIPTION.en: Blover, Hurrikale, Umbrella Leaf, Shrinking Violet
DESCRIPTION.zh: 受重伤时丢出失落之城小鬼

DESCRIPTION.en: Burns plants instead of just smashing them
DESCRIPTION.zh: 受重伤时丢出失落之城小鬼

DESCRIPTION.en: cold attacks extinguish torch
DESCRIPTION.zh: 受重伤时丢出失落之城小鬼

Chat.en: Porter Gargantuar dreams of the discovery that will make him powerful and influential. Maybe then the Imps will be the one carrying him around. It's always nice to have dreams.
Chat.zh: 搬运工巨尸梦想着能发现使他变得强大和有影响力的东西，也许到那时，小鬼们就会带着他到处跑了。有梦想总是好的。

Introduction.en: The floating fortress from the skies above.
Introduction.zh: 漂浮在空中的战斗堡垒。

DESCRIPTION.en: summons hordes of adventuring zombies
DESCRIPTION.zh: 向地上丢僵尸和沙袋

DESCRIPTION.en: calls in ambushes of lost pilot zombies
DESCRIPTION.zh: 向地上丢僵尸和沙袋

DESCRIPTION.en: drops bags o' sand onto flaming trap tiles, burning everything in that lane
DESCRIPTION.zh: 向地上丢僵尸和沙袋

Chat.en: After repeated failures with variously robotic engines of destruction, Dr. Zomboss decided to go with a kinder, more eco-friendly lighter-than-air-option to sow disaster and discord.
Chat.zh: 在使用各种毁灭型仿生机器屡屡失败后，僵尸博士决定使用一种更友好、更环保的、比空气更轻的选择，用来传播灾难和不和谐。

Introduction.en: The floating fortress from the skies above.
Introduction.zh: 漂浮在空中的战斗堡垒。

DESCRIPTION.en: summons hordes of stronger adventuring zombies
DESCRIPTION.zh: 向地上丢僵尸和沙袋

DESCRIPTION.en: calls in ambushes of rescue pilot zombies
DESCRIPTION.zh: 向地上丢僵尸和沙袋

DESCRIPTION.en: drops bags o' sand onto flaming trap tiles, burning everything in that lane
DESCRIPTION.zh: 向地上丢僵尸和沙袋

Chat.en: While Zomboss' latest reinvention of the Aerostatic Gondola, now 2.0, seems authentic, many question Zomboss' actual understanding of the visual references on his mechanism. Some even question its legitamacy and whether it is actually authentic. Zomboss says he never cared about its appearance, and all he cares about is that it has the minimal destruction impact while having maxmium power, but it ain't getting him anywhere.
Chat.zh: 在使用各种毁灭型仿生机器屡屡失败后，僵尸博士决定使用一种更友好、更环保的、比空气更轻的选择，用来传播灾难和不和谐。

Introduction.en: Regular music-loving neon mixtape zombie.
Introduction.zh: 普普通通爱好音乐的僵尸。

Chat.en: He's cutting down on his head-banging so as not to bang his head clean off.
Chat.zh: 他减少了晃头的次数，以免把头晃下来。

Introduction.en: Cones provide protection and focus the sound of righteous tunes.
Introduction.zh: 路障可提供保护，还能助他专注于纠正自己的曲调。

Chat.en: Neon Conehead Zombie used to be a big believer in de-evolution, but then he forgot what it meant.
Chat.zh: 霓虹路障僵尸曾经是退化论的忠实信徒，但后来他忘记了退化论的含义。

Introduction.en: Buckets absorb damage because that's just what they do.
Introduction.zh: 铁桶抵御攻击，因为这就是它的作用。

DESCRIPTION.en: bucket can be removed by Magnet Shroom
DESCRIPTION.zh: 用电线杆摧毁植物

Chat.en: Neon Buckethead Zombie had to go all the way to the dump to find a headband he really liked.
Chat.zh: 霓虹铁桶僵尸不得不跑到垃圾场去找他真正喜欢的头巾。

Introduction.en: Spotlight Neon Zombie's metal spotlight provides thorough eye-catching toughness.
Introduction.zh: 聚光灯霓虹僵尸的金属外壳提供了引人注目的保护。

Chat.en: He always wanted to play a major role under the spotlight — now his chance has finally arrived.
Chat.zh: 他总是期待能在聚光灯下发挥巨大的作用，现在他的机会来了。

Introduction.en: Marks the arrival of a huge mixtape-making "wave" of zombies.
Introduction.zh: 预示着一大波音乐人僵尸的到来。

Chat.en: Fluorescent colors and little yellow plastic strips are the marks of a truly hip, groundbreaking new style of zombie wave flag.
Chat.zh: 荧光色和黄色塑料小条是僵尸旗帜的标志，是一种真正时髦、开创性的新样式。

Introduction.en: Moshes plants back a space when his jam is playing.
Introduction.zh: 舞蹈时，将植物向左侧空间踢走。

DESCRIPTION.en: punk
DESCRIPTION.zh: 磁力菇能吸走他的头

DESCRIPTION.en: while jamming, nearby plants are pushed back
DESCRIPTION.zh: 磁力菇能吸走他的头

DESCRIPTION.en: head can be pulled off by Magnet Shroom
DESCRIPTION.zh: 磁力菇能吸走他的头

Chat.en: Punk Zombie's piercings represent his individuality and his belief in personal freedom, or maybe just that he fell face-first into a sewing machine.
Chat.zh: 朋克僵尸身上的穿孔代表了他的个性和对个人自由的信仰，或许也只是因为他一头栽进了缝纫机里。

Introduction.en: Neon Rally Zombie leads a great parade of wildly dancing zombies.
Introduction.zh: 霓虹大动员僵尸会引领着一大群游行的狂舞僵尸到来。

Chat.en: Learning to dance is an extremely demanding role. In comparison, building physical strength and leading the charge seem easier — far more dangerous though.
Chat.zh: 练习舞蹈是非常辛苦的一环，相比之下强身健体带头冲锋似乎还更轻松，只不过更危险罢了。

Introduction.en: Trails glamorous rainbows that protect zombies behind her when she's feeling the beat.
Introduction.zh: 感受到属于她的节奏时，映射出彩虹保护身后的僵尸。。

DESCRIPTION.en: pop
DESCRIPTION.zh: 磁力菇能吸走他的头

DESCRIPTION.en: while jamming, zombies located behind her become invincible
DESCRIPTION.zh: 磁力菇能吸走他的头

DESCRIPTION.en: while jamming, plants are crushed by her wheels
DESCRIPTION.zh: 在属于她的音乐下，用滑轮碾压植物

Chat.en: Glitter Zombie inspires zombies everywhere to boogie their brains out, whether it's just one moment or maybe forever, or at least until the lights come on and they're kicking everybody out.
Chat.zh: 闪耀僵尸激励世界各地的僵尸们尽情狂欢，不管是一瞬间还是永远，或者至少是在灯光亮起，在清扫工把他们都赶走之前。

Introduction.en: Spins microphone to damage nearby plants when he's dropping his sick, sick rhymes.
Introduction.zh: 尽情说唱时，顺便甩动麦克风攻击周围的植物。

DESCRIPTION.en: rap
DESCRIPTION.zh: 磁力菇能吸走他的头

DESCRIPTION.en: while jamming, destroys plants in a 3x3 area
DESCRIPTION.zh: 摧毁周围 3x3 范围的植物

Chat.en: MC Zom-B doesn't want you to know it, but his fancy bling is really just gold-plated zinc he got from his grandma.
Chat.zh: 麦克说唱家并不想让你知道，他那华丽的金饰其实只是他从奶奶那里得到的镀金锌。

Introduction.en: Kicks zombies forward when transported by the power of rap.
Introduction.zh: 说唱声带来的带感节奏，使他精力充沛地把僵尸往前推进。

DESCRIPTION.en: rap
DESCRIPTION.zh: 磁力菇能吸走他的头

DESCRIPTION.en: while jamming, nearby zombies are kicked farther down the lawn
DESCRIPTION.zh: 磁力菇能吸走他的头

Chat.en: Delivers only the freshest moves at bargain basement prices.
Chat.zh: 只以低的代价展现最新鲜的动作。

Introduction.en: Enters pushing an arcade cabinet.
Introduction.zh: 将一台游戏机推入场内。

DESCRIPTION.en: 8-bit
DESCRIPTION.zh: 磁力菇能吸走他的头

DESCRIPTION.en: while jamming, arcade cabinet spits out 8-Bit zombies
DESCRIPTION.zh: 磁力菇能吸走他的头

DESCRIPTION.en: crushes plants with arcade machine
DESCRIPTION.zh: 用游戏机碾压植物

DESCRIPTION.en: E.M. Peach
DESCRIPTION.zh: 用游戏机碾压植物

Chat.en: When it's a choice between quarters for games and quarters for laundry, Arcade Zombie is prepared to make the ultimate stinky sacrifice.
Chat.zh: 在游戏硬币和洗衣硬币之间做出选择时，街机僵尸准备做出最恶臭的牺牲。

Introduction.en: Pixelated zombie generated by super cool arcade machine.
Introduction.zh: 由超酷街机生成的像素僵尸，普通、路障和铁桶都有。

DESCRIPTION.en: 8-bit
DESCRIPTION.zh: 磁力菇能吸走他的头

Chat.en: Being made out of light and positional co-ordinates has no effect on this erzatz zombie's ravenous hunger for tangy brains.
Chat.zh: 把僵尸变成光和像素并不能影响他对美味大脑的贪婪渴求。

Introduction.en: His pixelated cone doubles his durability on the lawn.
Introduction.zh: 由超酷街机生成的像素僵尸，普通、路障和铁桶都有。

DESCRIPTION.en: 8-bit
DESCRIPTION.zh: 磁力菇能吸走他的头

Chat.en: The cone powerup in honestly one of the better ones in the game, making him more versatile then the basic, and with it's fairly common drop rates it's not suprising as to why he's one of the most played characters in the game.
Chat.zh: 把僵尸变成光和像素并不能影响他对美味大脑的贪婪渴求。

Introduction.en: His pixelated bucket help him survive longer against the plants.
Introduction.zh: 由超酷街机生成的像素僵尸，普通、路障和铁桶都有。

DESCRIPTION.en: 8-bit
DESCRIPTION.zh: 磁力菇能吸走他的头

DESCRIPTION.en: 8-bit bucket can be removed by Magnet Shroom
DESCRIPTION.zh: 用电线杆摧毁植物

Chat.zh: 把僵尸变成光和像素并不能影响他对美味大脑的贪婪渴求。

Introduction.en: Holds aloft a boom box that tranquilizes all plants with its heartfelt tunes.
Introduction.zh: 高举着音箱，用美妙的曲调安抚所有植物。

DESCRIPTION.en: ballad
DESCRIPTION.zh: 磁力菇能吸走他的头

DESCRIPTION.en: raises he boom box, halting all plants on the lawn
DESCRIPTION.zh: 音箱对地下植物和魔音甜菜无效

DESCRIPTION.en: boombox has no effect on ground plants and Phat Beets
DESCRIPTION.zh: 音箱对地下植物和魔音甜菜无效

Chat.en: Boombox Zombie doesn't want to buy, sell or process anything; he just really wants to consume your brains.
Chat.zh: 音箱僵尸不想买卖或编写任何音乐，他只想消化你的大脑。

Introduction.en: Tossed past most of your defenses, then rocks out to your detriment.
Introduction.zh: 被丢出越过你的大部分防线，然后再摇滚前行。

DESCRIPTION.en: Shrinking Violet
DESCRIPTION.zh: 用游戏机碾压植物

Chat.en: Impunk's lyrics have been described as "banal", "incoherent," and "totally expressive of the Zompunk movement at its finest."
Chat.zh: 朋克小鬼的音乐风格被形容为 “平庸”、“语无伦次”，“完全表现了‘僵尸朋克’动作的精髓”。

Introduction.en: Dominating leviathan of power-rocking mayhem.
Introduction.zh: 震撼人心的力量型巨尸。

DESCRIPTION.en: metal
DESCRIPTION.zh: 磁力菇能吸走他的头

DESCRIPTION.en: crushes plants with guitar
DESCRIPTION.zh: 用电吉他摧毁植物

DESCRIPTION.en: launches Impunk when damaged
DESCRIPTION.zh: 受重伤时丢出朋克小鬼

DESCRIPTION.en: Blover, Hurrikale, Umbrella Leaf, Shrinking Violet
DESCRIPTION.zh: 当重金属音乐响起时，砸出震耳欲聋的音波

DESCRIPTION.en: while jamming, creates sonic blasts with his guitar
DESCRIPTION.zh: 当重金属音乐响起时，砸出震耳欲聋的音波

Chat.en: Hair Metal Gargantuar only knows one chord, but you'd better believe he'll play it all night and then some.
Chat.zh: 重金属巨尸只懂和弦，但你最好相信他会弹吉他，否则他要弹上一整晚甚至更久。

Introduction.en: An intimate evening with some of Dr. Zomboss' most recent and painful explorations.
Introduction.zh: 与僵尸博士一起狂欢一晚吧，度过这场惊险旅行的休息时光。

DESCRIPTION.en: all
DESCRIPTION.zh: 磁力菇能吸走他的头

DESCRIPTION.en: summons hordes of jamming zombies
DESCRIPTION.zh: 磁力菇能吸走他的头

DESCRIPTION.en: creates speakers that do passive damage and send out shockwave attacks
DESCRIPTION.zh: 音响对近前的植物（除了地下植物和魔音甜菜）造成伤害，也会发射音波

DESCRIPTION.en: passive speaker damage will not not hurt Phat Beet and ground plants
DESCRIPTION.zh: 音响对近前的植物（除了地下植物和魔音甜菜）造成伤害，也会发射音波

Chat.en: In another world, in another time, Dr. Zomboss would receive the bounty of enthusiastic applause that is his due. Not here and now, though. Nope.
Chat.zh: 在另一个世界，另一个时空，僵尸博士本应收获如潮掌声——那是他应得的礼赞。可惜此时此刻，此地此景，并没有。

Introduction.en: Regular beard-having zombie from the unimaginable past.
Introduction.zh: 普通的留着胡须，来自远古的僵尸。

Chat.en: Jurassic Zombie is NOT primitive. See, he's wearing a tie and everything!
Chat.zh: 侏罗纪僵尸并不原始。看，他还打着领带呢！

Introduction.en: Cones, or old leftover horns bundled together with string so that they look sort of like a cone, provide some middling protection.
Introduction.zh: 他那由被恐龙砸断的角捆起来做成的路障提供了不错的保护。

Chat.en: Jurassic Conehead Zombie is trying to get the jump on the whole "traffic cone" idea. He figures it'll be a HUGE market in about 150 million years.
Chat.zh: 侏罗纪路障僵尸试图抢占整个“路障”这一概念的先例。他认为，大约 1.5 亿年后，这将形成一个巨大的贸易。

Introduction.en: Crude drawings of buckets provide as much protection as the real thing.
Introduction.zh: 粗略涂画出的铁桶图案使他极其抗揍。

DESCRIPTION.en: stone bucket can be removed by Magnet Shroom
DESCRIPTION.zh: 用电线杆摧毁植物

Chat.en: The real question, the burning mystery, is: where did he find blue fur for his outfit?
Chat.zh: 真正的问题是：他从哪里找到蓝色的皮毛做衣服的？

Introduction.en: Fossil skulls not only provide a huge amount of damage absorption, but are also extremely classy.
Introduction.zh: 头骨化石不仅能吸收大量伤害，而且提高了他的档次。

Chat.en: Contrary to his name, Jurassic Fossilhead's fossil head isn't actually a fossil. That skull's maybe a week and a half old, tops.
Chat.zh: 与他的名字相反，侏罗纪龙骨头僵尸的化石头实际上并不是化石，那个头骨最多只有一周半的历史。

Introduction.en: Amberhead Zombie's head-engulfing ball of amber provides hardened protection.
Introduction.zh: 琥珀头僵尸那包裹着头部的琥珀球提供坚硬的保护。

Chat.en: If you were to extract DNA from the Amberhead Zombie and combine it with the DNA of a frog, you'd be breaking the law at some point.
Chat.zh: 如果你从琥珀头僵尸身上提取 DNA 并与青蛙的 DNA 相结合，你在某种程度上会改变整个时间线。

Introduction.en: Marks the arrival of a huge epochal "wave" of highly anachronistic zombies.
Introduction.zh: 预示着一大波老土过时的僵尸的到来。

Chat.en: He's not only got a flag, but he's also got a can-do attitude and a fierce hunger for success. Success and brains.
Chat.zh: 他不仅拥有着一面旗帜，而且有一种敢作敢为的态度和对成功的强烈渴望，成功和头脑。

Introduction.en: Jurassic Rally Zombie marks the arrival of large group of zombies.
Introduction.zh: 侏罗纪大动员僵尸的出现代表了一大群僵尸的到来。

Chat.en: Where did Jurassic Rally Zombie get his fancy new flag? Nobody knows. It's a mystery. The police should look into it. Or maybe we could get a fund together and hire a detective. It's a real puzzle.
Chat.zh: 侏罗纪大动员僵尸从哪儿弄来的新旗帜？没人知道，这是个谜。警方应该调查一下，或者我们可以集资雇个侦探，这真是让人摸不着头脑。

Introduction.en: A trudging, damage-resistant zombie who is immune to Primal Peashooter's knockback.
Introduction.zh: 一个蹒跚而行，却很抗打的僵尸，可免疫原始豌豆射手的击退效果。

DESCRIPTION.en: immune to projectile knockback
DESCRIPTION.zh: 免疫原始豌豆射手的击退

Chat.en: Jurassic Bully is slow, stupid, and smells bad. But hey, at least he's punctual.
Chat.zh: 侏罗纪野人僵尸又慢又笨，还臭得要命。不过，至少他很守时。

Introduction.en: Jurassic Rockpuncher pummels plants with rocks tied to his hands.
Introduction.zh: 侏罗纪打火石野人用绑在手上的石头猛击植物。

DESCRIPTION.en: crushes plants with rocks tied to his hands and leaves a scorched tile
DESCRIPTION.zh: 用绑在手上的打火石砸击植物

DESCRIPTION.en: immune to projectile knockback
DESCRIPTION.zh: 免疫原始豌豆射手的击退

Chat.en: Somebody tied rocks to Jurassic Rockpuncher's hands. Being unable to remove them (because he had rocks tied to his hands), he was left with no choice but to roll with it.
Chat.zh: 有人把石头绑在了侏罗纪野人的手上。由于无法取下这些石头（因为他的手上绑着石头），他别无选择，只能拎着石头到处跑。

Introduction.en: A weaker, smaller, much more vicious version of the typical Jurassic zombie.
Introduction.zh: 他相对一般的侏罗纪僵尸体型更弱、更小、更凶残。

DESCRIPTION.en: Shrinking Violet
DESCRIPTION.zh: 受重伤时丢出小鬼

Chat.en: This nasty little nipper can make a serious dent in your defenses if left to his own devious devices.
Chat.zh: 如果任由这个讨厌的小东西胡作非为，他会严重破坏你的防御系统。

Introduction.en: Prehistoric provider of Mesozoic malarkey.
Introduction.zh: 创造了史前中生代的传说。

DESCRIPTION.en: crushes plants with bone
DESCRIPTION.zh: 用骨头摧毁植物

DESCRIPTION.en: launches Jurassic Imp when damaged
DESCRIPTION.zh: 受重伤时丢出侏罗纪小鬼

DESCRIPTION.en: Blover, Hurrikale, Umbrella Leaf, Shrinking Violet
DESCRIPTION.zh: 受重伤时丢出小鬼

DESCRIPTION.en: is stronger but slower than normal gargantuars
DESCRIPTION.zh: 受重伤时丢出小鬼

Chat.en: Jurassic Gargantuar wonders how there can be zombies millions of years before the advent of humanity. He doesn't let it get in the way of his plant-bashing, though.
Chat.zh: 侏罗纪巨尸很好奇在人类出现之前的几百万年，怎么会有僵尸。不过，他并没有因此而影响对植物的砸击的力度。

Introduction.en: A mechanical means of dinosaurian destruction.
Introduction.zh: 摧毁你前院的远古时期最凶狠的机械恶兽。

DESCRIPTION.en: summons hored of prehistoric zombies and dinosaurs
DESCRIPTION.zh: 召唤僵尸时同时召唤恐龙

DESCRIPTION.en: uses eyes to fire lasers down 2 lanes, leaving scorched tiles behind
DESCRIPTION.zh: 召唤僵尸时同时召唤恐龙

DESCRIPTION.en: fires a missile at a random plant on the lawn
DESCRIPTION.zh: 召唤僵尸时同时召唤恐龙

Chat.en: With flagrant disregard for temporal tidiness and simple good taste, Dr. Zomboss figured it would be a good idea to build a big metal dinosaur.
Chat.zh: 由于自身对时空秩序的蔑视与对基本审美的不屑，僵尸博士认为造个巨型金属恐龙是个绝妙的主意。

Introduction.en: A mechanical means of dinosaurian destruction.
Introduction.zh: 摧毁你前院的远古时期最凶狠的机械恶兽。

DESCRIPTION.en: summons hored of prehistoric zombies and dinosaurs
DESCRIPTION.zh: 召唤僵尸时同时召唤恐龙

DESCRIPTION.en: uses eyes to fire lasers down 2 lanes, leaving scorched tiles behind
DESCRIPTION.zh: 召唤僵尸时同时召唤恐龙

DESCRIPTION.en: fires a missile at a random plant on the lawn
DESCRIPTION.zh: 召唤僵尸时同时召唤恐龙

Chat.en: When it's not being piloted by Dr. Zomboss, the Zombot Dinotronic Mechasaur 2.0 likes to run along the beaches of the marsh, with it having the knowledge that this beautiful land won't last forever.
Chat.zh: 由于自身对时空秩序的蔑视与对基本审美的不屑，僵尸博士认为造个巨型金属恐龙是个绝妙的主意。

Introduction.en: Regular jetpacked zombie.
Introduction.zh: 普普通通背着喷射器的僵尸。

DESCRIPTION.en: uses his flamethrower to damage your fortress
DESCRIPTION.zh: 发射正电荷或负电荷

Chat.en: Don’t underestimate Pilot Zombie. Keeping the balance in the air instead of being upside down isn’t that easy. Flying gives him a feeling of freedom - but that's true only when he still had a brain.
Chat.zh: 千万不要小看普通飞行员僵尸，在空中保持平衡而不是四脚朝天并不是一件容易的事情。飞翔带给他们自由的感觉，当然，那是在他们还有脑子的时候。

Introduction.en: His cone glued to his head makes him twice tougher than normal pilot.
Introduction.zh: 他那胶粘在头上的路障使他变得比原先抗打两倍。

DESCRIPTION.en: uses his flamethrower to damage your fortress
DESCRIPTION.zh: 发射正电荷或负电荷

Chat.en: In order to adapt to the strong wind in air, Conehead Pilot purchased a new strong adhesive. Although others advised him not to take the cone high in the air, he considers himself a symbol of his stylish image.
Chat.zh: 为了适应空中强劲的风速，路障飞行员购买了一款新型强效粘合剂。尽管僵尸们都建议他不要将路障带到高空中，但是他自认为那是他时尚形象的象征。

Introduction.en: His fan-decorated bucket provides great protection from damage.
Introduction.zh: 他那安装了风扇的铁桶使他极其抗揍。

DESCRIPTION.en: uses his flamethrower to damage your ship
DESCRIPTION.zh: 发射正电荷或负电荷

DESCRIPTION.en: bucket can be removed by Magnet Shroom
DESCRIPTION.zh: 用电线杆摧毁植物

Chat.en: You hear that? The clunking sound of the updraft hitting the buckets. Yep, that's the zombies' favorite music, which always brings fun to their boring lives. That's why Buckethead Pilot is the most famous pilot.
Chat.zh: 听见了吗？上升气流撞击铁桶所发出的哐当声，对，那就是僵尸们最喜爱的音乐，它总是可以给僵尸们枯燥无味的生活带来乐趣。这也是铁桶飞行员最受僵尸们追捧的原因。

Introduction.en: Marks the arrival of an aeronautical "wave" of zombies.
Introduction.zh: 预示着一大波飞行的僵尸的到来。

DESCRIPTION.en: uses his flamethrower to damage your fortress
DESCRIPTION.zh: 发射正电荷或负电荷

Chat.en: In Flag Pilot's view, an outstanding flag is very important if you want to keep up with the latest trend. However, the zombies are only concerned about whether he can lead them to fresh brains...
Chat.zh: 在旗帜飞行员看来，若是想要走在时尚的前沿，一面鲜明的旗帜是非常重要的。然而，僵尸们却只关心他能否带领他们找到新鲜的脑子，时尚什么的，并不能拿来吃啊。

Introduction.en: Regular unarmed zombie.
Introduction.zh: 普普通通背着喷射器的僵尸。

Chat.en: He could never figure out how to use a flamethrower.
Chat.zh: 千万不要小看普通飞行员僵尸，在空中保持平衡而不是四脚朝天并不是一件容易的事情。飞翔带给他们自由的感觉，当然，那是在他们还有脑子的时候。

Introduction.en: Unarmed zombie that holds his flag high to signal an incoming wave of weaponless zombies.
Introduction.zh: 普普通通背着喷射器的僵尸。

Chat.en: Unlike his other unarmed comrades, Unarmed Flag Pilot chooses to not use a weapon, and instead holds his flag with pride as it flaps in the wind.
Chat.zh: 千万不要小看普通飞行员僵尸，在空中保持平衡而不是四脚朝天并不是一件容易的事情。飞翔带给他们自由的感觉，当然，那是在他们还有脑子的时候。

Introduction.en: Transport Boats drops Paratrooper Imps deep into your defenses.
Introduction.zh: 使用战斗机上的机枪攻击植物和飞船。

DESCRIPTION.en: deploys a squadron of imps deep into your defenses
DESCRIPTION.zh: 投掷的子弹或毒能直接伤害到小鬼驾驶员

DESCRIPTION.en: Ampereum plantfood
DESCRIPTION.zh: 投掷的子弹或毒能直接伤害到小鬼驾驶员

DESCRIPTION.en: Shrinking Violet, Umbrella Leaf
DESCRIPTION.zh: 投掷的子弹或毒能直接伤害到小鬼驾驶员

Chat.en: It's not easy to be the pilot for Zomboss' infamous War-grade Hover Armor for Levitation Endeavors Airship; see Wadsworth over there? He had to practice day in and night out, go under rigorous training, have a balanced diet of plants and brains, and be a bit of a nepo-baby to get in the forces.
Chat.zh: 为了成为一名优秀的战斗机僵尸，在飞行学校学习期间，他总共学习了97门飞行课程、通过了81场考试、经历了101场模拟飞行演练……他总是滔滔不绝地和别人提起自己高超的飞行技术，不过坐过他的飞机的僵尸似乎都不愿意再次提及这个话题。

Introduction.en: Shoots lightning bolts towards plants with a lightning gun.
Introduction.zh: 使用闪电枪发射电荷攻击植物。

DESCRIPTION.en: shoots electric bolts at your plants
DESCRIPTION.zh: 发射正电荷或负电荷

DESCRIPTION.en: two positive charges will damage the plant until it dies
DESCRIPTION.zh: 发射正电荷或负电荷

DESCRIPTION.en: two negative charges will leave the plant stunned in place
DESCRIPTION.zh: 发射正电荷或负电荷

DESCRIPTION.en: a positive and a negative charge will slow the plant's movement down by a lot
DESCRIPTION.zh: 发射正电荷或负电荷

DESCRIPTION.en: uses lightning gun to damage your fortress
DESCRIPTION.zh: 发射正电荷或负电荷

Chat.en: The two large batteries on his back could have provided enough voltage to destroy your fortress, but he carelessly connected them in parallel.
Chat.zh: 他后背上的两颗大电池本来可以提供摧毁一切的电压，但是他粗心地将它们并联了。

Introduction.en: Parachute directly into your fortress and proceed rightwards.
Introduction.zh: 空降直至你的飞船中，并向右行进。

DESCRIPTION.en: Shrinking Violet
DESCRIPTION.zh: 投掷的子弹或毒能直接伤害到小鬼驾驶员

Chat.en: Imp Paratrooper is actually not good at landing and falls every time, but his greatest achievement is inventing the self-storing parachute.
Chat.zh: 伞兵小鬼的实际上不善于着陆，每次都摔一跤，但实际上他最伟大的成就是发明了可以自动收纳的降落伞。

Introduction.en: Can only be defeated when both cabins are destroyed.
Introduction.zh: 两个机舱全部被击毁后才会坠落。

DESCRIPTION.en: 2 lanes
DESCRIPTION.zh: 瘫痪的机舱将受到的伤害的一半传递给另一个机舱

DESCRIPTION.en: both sides must be destroyed
DESCRIPTION.zh: 瘫痪的机舱将受到的伤害的一半传递给另一个机舱

DESCRIPTION.en: destroyed cabin passes half of the damage it receives to the other
DESCRIPTION.zh: 瘫痪的机舱将受到的伤害的一半传递给另一个机舱

DESCRIPTION.en: shreds plants with propellers
DESCRIPTION.zh: 瘫痪的机舱将受到的伤害的一半传递给另一个机舱

DESCRIPTION.en: destroyed cabin cannot attack plants
DESCRIPTION.zh: 瘫痪的机舱会被植物挡下

DESCRIPTION.en: rams into your fortress, destroying the plane but dealing massive damage
DESCRIPTION.zh: 瘫痪的机舱将受到的伤害的一半传递给另一个机舱

Chat.en: The brothers in the Double-Cabin Aircraft dream of "traveling the world" and "conquering the earth". However, they have never agreed on where to explore. "I just can't communicate with a brainless partner!" They always complain about each other like this.
Chat.zh: 双舱飞行僵尸拥有“环球旅行”、“征服世界”的探险梦。然而他们兄弟俩从未在去哪儿探险这个问题上达成一致。“我简直无法同一个没有脑子的家伙沟通！”他们总是这样气鼓鼓地抱怨对方。

Introduction.en: Destroying everything with its bare hands with nothing to be affraid of.
Introduction.zh: 徒手摧毁一切，并且无所畏惧的巨尸。

DESCRIPTION.en: crushes plants with fists
DESCRIPTION.zh: 用重拳摧毁植物

DESCRIPTION.en: damages your fortress with a drill
DESCRIPTION.zh: 用电钻破坏你的飞船

DESCRIPTION.en: launches Imp Paratroopers when damaged
DESCRIPTION.zh: 受重伤时丢出伞兵小鬼

DESCRIPTION.en: Shrinking Violet, Umbrella Leaf
DESCRIPTION.zh: 投掷的子弹或毒能直接伤害到小鬼驾驶员

Chat.en: Just like a pair of worn-out headphones, the Flying Gargantuar's aircraft has an uneven power output on the left and right. In fact, right now, he's slowly spinning in place.
Chat.zh: 就像用久了的耳机一样，飞行巨尸的飞行器左右功率不相同，其实现在他正以极慢的速度自转呢。

Introduction.en: Attack your plants and fortress with the machine gun on his plane.
Introduction.zh: 使用战斗机上的机枪攻击植物和飞船。

DESCRIPTION.en: fires the machine gun on his plane, dealing damage to your plants and fortress
DESCRIPTION.zh: 投掷的子弹或毒能直接伤害到小鬼驾驶员

DESCRIPTION.en: will circle back to a random lane if he touches a plant or your fortress
DESCRIPTION.zh: 投掷的子弹或毒能直接伤害到小鬼驾驶员

DESCRIPTION.en: Spinapple
DESCRIPTION.zh: 投掷的子弹或毒能直接伤害到小鬼驾驶员

DESCRIPTION.en: lobbed attacks, poison attacks, Shrinking Violet
DESCRIPTION.zh: 投掷的子弹或毒能直接伤害到小鬼驾驶员

DESCRIPTION.en: if the driver is killed, the plane will stop firing and rapidly charge forward and will explode on contact
DESCRIPTION.zh: 投掷的子弹或毒能直接伤害到小鬼驾驶员

Chat.en: To become an excellent pilot, he studied a total of 97 flight courses, passed 81 exams, and underwent 101 simulated flight drills during his time at flight school... He always talks endlessly to others about his superb flying skills, but the zombies who have ridden in his plane seem unwilling to bring up this topic again.
Chat.zh: 为了成为一名优秀的战斗机僵尸，在飞行学校学习期间，他总共学习了97门飞行课程、通过了81场考试、经历了101场模拟飞行演练……他总是滔滔不绝地和别人提起自己高超的飞行技术，不过坐过他的飞机的僵尸似乎都不愿意再次提及这个话题。
